x-enumeration-literals.name: Instructed Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount the debtor asks their bank to transfer (e.g., “Send 100 EUR”).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Equivalent Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: If the debtor’s account is in a different currency, this is the converted equivalent (e.g., 100 USD = 91 EUR).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debtor Account Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: The actual amount debited from the debtor’s account (after currency conversion, possibly including charges).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interbank Settlement Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount exchanged/settled between the banks (may be in a different settlement currency, e.g., USD).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creditor Account Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount credited to the creditor’s account in their account currency (e.g., GBP).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Net / Received Amount and Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: The final amount the creditor actually receives after any deductions (e.g., fees).
